title: Decision & Compliance Review Board - Task Template
description: Schema establishing form fields, read-only AI compliance recommendations, and final action sign-offs for human review of high-risk robotic lawn-mower fleet incidents in UiPath Action Center.

readOnlyContext.description: Decision context and AI recommendation shown to the reviewer.

decision.description: The final Action Center compliance action approved by the human reviewer.

reviewerNotes.description: Mandatory explanation justifying the human review board decision or compliance action override.

reviewerName.description: Authorized signature of the compliance officer.

workOrderId.description: Compliance Work Order ID assigned to this action.
